input.value: The journal belongs to a grave-robber named Edric who entered the barrow three weeks ago seeking the ember_chamber, where he believed a bound fire-spirit guards a cache of valuables. His final entry warns that Snik — a goblin he hired as a guide — betrayed him and sealed the entrance.

result.value: The journal belongs to a grave-robber named Edric who entered the barrow three weeks ago seeking the ember_chamber, where he believed a bound fire-spirit guards a cache of valuables. His final entry warns that Snik — a goblin he hired as a guide — betrayed him and sealed the entrance.
